topic: I deliver food at night and I have learned which addresses to never go to twice
title: I Deliver Food at Night and I Have Learned Which Addresses to Never Go to Twice | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There are addresses I will never deliver to twice. Fourteen Voss Lane is one of them.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a dark one-story ranch house at night, no porch light on, a takeout food bag visible on the unlit front doorstep, the rest of the street empty, slight fog at the edge of frame, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Most addresses are forgettable. Some you remember forever.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot from a car window of a residential street at night, a row of houses with varied porch lights on, a delivery driver silhouette at a lit doorway in the middle distance, the rest of the block quiet, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Fourteen Voss Lane. First time. No porch light.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a one-story ranch house at night with no exterior lights on, the front walk leading to a dark front door, the nearest streetlamp a full house-length away, hedges overgrown along the front walk, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I left the bag. Standard drop. Drove away.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a takeout bag sitting on a dark concrete doorstep, the porch completely unlit, the door closed, ambient streetlamp light barely reaching the step, vertical 9:16 framing

close shot of a delivery app screen showing an address notification, the street name partially visible, the customer name field showing only a single initial, the phone screen lit in a dark car interior, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I knocked this time. No answer.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a closed front door at night seen from a front porch, a peeling brass door knocker in the center, a doorbell button to the side with the small light inside it dark, the surrounding porch unlit, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I left. Checked the app. Order marked delivered thirty minutes before I arrived.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen showing a delivery app order status marked as delivered with a timestamp, the surrounding car interior dark, the lit screen the only light source, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I had been assigned the same order twice.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a delivery app screen showing two identical order entries for the same address listed one above the other, the same item, the same customer initial, the same price, phone in a dark car, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I called support. They saw only one order. One delivery.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand holding a phone to an ear in a parked car at night, the delivery app still visible on the car mounted phone screen in the background, the streetlamp outside the window the only exterior light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The third time Voss Lane appeared I accepted it before I saw the address. I pulled up and sat in the driveway. The bag on the porch from my last visit was still there. Untouched. Same bag.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot from a car stopped in a driveway at night, headlights illuminating the front of a dark one-story house, a takeout bag clearly visible on the front doorstep, the bag slightly weather-worn, the door still closed, hedges dark on either side, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I drove away and blocked the address.
scenes.image_prompt: interior shot from a moving car at night, the dark house receding in the rear-view mirror, the delivery app screen visible in the foreground showing the address being flagged, the road ahead empty, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The app unblocked it last week. New order. New customer name. Same initial.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a delivery app screen in a dark car interior showing a new order notification, the address visible, the customer name field showing a single letter, the phone screen the only light, the street outside the windshield completely dark, vertical 9:16 framing
